interpretation.read: Prompt visibility must be fixed first. Existing screener_quality can overstate input_to_claude when select_tickers trims internally.
interpretation.action: Persist actual prompt tickers and curation deferred_reason before changing live behavior.

interpretation.read: Use routing-level demotion first. It preserves Claude output while preventing immediate high-zone execution.
interpretation.action: Shadow BUY_READY/PROBE_READY -> WATCH_TRIGGER for at_high/near_high until OR/VWAP/volume confirmation exists.

interpretation.read: Cap expansion is a visibility change, not a buy permission change.
interpretation.action: Raise KR overextended cap gradually and track score-ranked top30/top36 misses before enabling any extra execution.

interpretation.read: Low-liquidity ignition should be a separate small-probe path after confirmation, not a relaxation of Claude VETO.
interpretation.action: Keep low_liq_ignite60 in shadow until sample size grows.

limits: 2018 long backtest has daily entry_gap/returns, not Claude prompt or intraday VWAP/OR features.
WATCH_TRIGGER simulation on ticker_selection_log uses from_high_bucket/change/liquidity proxies from 2026-04-07..2026-05-08.
Prompt visibility simulation uses raw_calls only where a raw Claude selection prompt exists.
low_liq_ignite60 uses preopen sampled outcome data and is an entry-offset approximation, not tick-level fill simulation.
